notes: Passive - regex-scans the page's outerHTML for 'full_name', 'pk' (Threads ID), 'biography', and 'username' fields embedded in inline JSON/scripts, then shows a draggable modal titled 'Threads User Data' with attribution 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. The page description notes a reload may be needed for it to work, so a generous wait_ms is used. Fields default to 'Not found' if the regexes don't match, so the modal should appear regardless.

checks.comment: At least one strong element with user data or 'Not found' placeholders
